title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how AI coding tools have changed their development workflows, productivity measurement approaches, and provide advice for other leaders adopting these tools at scale. Key observations include shifts in the software development lifecycle, reduced time spent on pure coding, and accelerated delivery timelines through AI-assisted development.
